name: Mallat
description_en: Lord Mallat is a member of the Black Rose. He is a noble and a strategist. He is also aware of, and has dealings, with Mordekaiser and his faction.
description_fr: Lord Mallat est membre de la Rose Noire. C'est un noble et un stratège. Il connaît également Mordekaiser et sa faction et entretient des relations avec eux.
